PowerShell($fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\("C:\\_superposition\\AudHDities-Resonance\\resonance-compass\\release\\resonance-compass-v2.0.0.apk"\); $br = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader\($fs\); foreach \($lho in @\(962321, 10453032\)\) { $fs.Seek\($lho, 'Begin'\) | Out-Null; $sig = $br.ReadUInt32\(\); $fs.Seek\(22, 'Current'\) | Out-Null; $nlen = $br.ReadUInt16\(\); $elen = $br.ReadUInt16\(\); $name = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($br.ReadBytes\($nlen\)\); $dataOff = $lho + 30 + $nlen + $elen; "name=$name dataOffset=$dataOff mod4096=$\($dataOff % 4096\) mod16384=$\($dataOff % 16384\)" }; $br.Dispose\(\))
